Zone Coordination Protocol (ZCP)

Secure, zone-aware data coordination for distributed systems

📚 Protocol Specification

Complete RFC-style protocol specification with wire format, message types, and cryptographic details.

View Specification →

🔐 Suite Selection Guide

Guidelines for selecting cryptographic suites based on security requirements and performance needs.

View Guide →

🌐 Transport Implementation

Step-by-step guide for implementing new transports and extending the ZCP transport layer.

View Guide →

⚙️ Provisioning Workflow

Complete guide for device provisioning, certificate management, and zone configuration.

View Guide →

🌍 Zone Configuration

Cookbook for configuring zones, residency tags, and cross-zone data policies.

View Cookbook →

🔍 Wireshark Dissector

Network analysis tool with Lua dissector for debugging ZCP traffic and protocol analysis.

View Guide →

📖 API Documentation

Rust API documentation for all ZCP crates, generated from source code with examples.

clonic-core clonic-crypto clonic-identity clonic-transport clonic-transport-tcp
